title: senecio lunulatus
intro: Senecio lunulatus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids, such as senecio alkaloids, that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio lunulatus include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Senecio lunulatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
